mapper.select: select tenant_id as tenantId, db_type as dbType, driver_class as driverClass, jdbc_url as jdbcUrl, username as username, password as password, enabled as enabled, sql_inpatient_range as sqlInpatientRange, sql_outpatient_range as sqlOutpatientRange, remark as remark from sys_his_external_db where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and enabled = '1' limit 1
